name: Merge
description: Combine multiple PDFs into one file, in order.

name: Split
description: Extract a page range into a new PDF.

name: Delete pages
description: Remove selected pages and download the rest.

name: Reorder
description: Change page order with thumbnails and up/down controls.

name: Watermark
description: Stamp text across every page with opacity and position.

name: Images → PDF
description: Turn JPEG/PNG (and friends) into a multi-page PDF.

name: PDF → Images
description: Export each page as JPEG and download a ZIP.
